concepts.title: Optical property of ellipse
concepts.conceptBody:
Reflection property of an ellipse 

If an incoming light ray passes through one focus (S) strike the concave side of the ellipse then it will get reflected towards other focus $\left( {\text{{S}'}} \right)$.

and $\angle \text{SP}{{\text{S}}^{\text{ }\!\!'\!\!\text{ }}}=\angle \text{SQ}{{\text{S}}^{\text{ }\!\!'\!\!\text{ }}}$

examples.title: What is reflection property of an ellipse?
Reflection property of ellipse is applicable in which of the following?
A ray emanating from the point $(0,6)$ is incident on the ellipse $25 x^2+16 y^2=1600$ at the point $P$ with ordinate $S$. After reflection, ray cuts the $Y$-axis at $B$. The length of $P B$ is
